name: m3_pair_same_epoch
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x", $t : ts) over window:time(150ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): same-epoch pair {tag:z, ts:7} then {tag:x}: each update queues its OWN entry but evaluates against the epoch-FINAL bean (tag=x) — the FIRST entry's {tag,ts} mask HITS and revives at ts=7. The z state never reaches the network (BfDump PropagationList proxy).
